description: Compare insurance quotes from SafeDrive ($85/mo, $320/semi, $450/yr), QuickQuote ($78/mo, $340/semi, $475/yr), and BudgetShield ($92/mo, $295/semi, $425/yr). The resulting spreadsheet must include annualized costs, total calculations, and conditional formatting to highlight the cheapest option. Save the file to ~/Documents/insurance_comparison.xlsx.

natural_language.prompt: Create an insurance comparison spreadsheet. Enter quotes from SafeDrive Insurance (Liability $85/month, Comprehensive $320/semi-annual, Collision $450/annual), QuickQuote Auto (Liability $78/month, Comprehensive $340/semi-annual, Collision $475/annual), and BudgetShield Cars (Liability $92/month, Comprehensive $295/semi-annual, Collision $425/annual). Convert all to annual costs, calculate totals, and highlight the cheapest option.
